description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing pylint3 with apt-get, then prints the Python version, the paths of python3 and pylint3, the current working directory and a full directory listing. Define a job named pylint (which runs in the default stage) that executes the command pylint3 *.py --ignore=*test.py. Use the runner's default Docker image (no explicit image or services are defined). Do not configure any caches, artifacts, or rules, and no deployment targets are required.
